basicInfo.name: Nightmare Kagura
basicInfo.subname: Guardian of the Eight Serpents' Sword
basicInfo.flavor: The seal was broken, and ancient dragons awakened. Kagura's mother sacrificed herself to stabilize it. Afterward, Kagura inherited her mother's duty and began watching over the Eight Serpents' Sword.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Unleashed - Eight Serpents' Sword
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 62% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Unable to Recover. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 62% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Unleashed - Snake Hunting
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 57% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Eight Serpents' Curse
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Revives with Indomitable upon falling in battle. [Ends After: Taking 15 Hit(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Grants 5 Debuff Removal(s) upon triggering Indomitable.

profile.story:
Kagura is the shaman tasked with guarding the Eight Serpents' Sword, which seals away Orochi.
Her mother and her grandmother before her each devoted their entire lives to maintaining the seal, but nothing can imprison an ancient monster forever.
One day, without warning, the seal broke...
Powerful dark energy began consuming the people of the shrine one by one.
Kagura's mother immediately cut off her right hand and used her blood to forge a new seal.
Orochi screamed and cursed, but was ultimately dragged back into the Abyss, unable to break through the renewed seal.
However, sealing Orochi also caused Kagura's mother's death, and Kagura inherited her mother's role as the guardian of the Eight Serpents' Sword.
Then, one day, Kagura's heart wavered. Her rage towards Orochi and her guilt over failing to save her mother created a void within her heart.
At that very moment, a snake leapt out of the blade and bit her. From that day on, her powers as a shaman have grown exponentially.
However, Kagura knows...
Orochi's power is slowly consuming her.
